description: Creates a plane in 3D space defined by a normal vector and a point on the plane.
utility: Create a plane from a normal vector and a point

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: A point that lies on the plane

alternates.description: Plane with inline normal vector and point definitions
Plane from previously defined vector3d and point3d variables

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
n = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 1)
A = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
P = normalplane3d(G, n, A)

G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
P = normalplane3d(G, vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1), point3d(G, 0, 0, 3), fc(lightblue), fo(0.3))
